components.name: rr-toggle
components.summary: Form-associated toggle switch for binary on/off settings.

props.name: checked
props.description: On/off state. Reflected.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the toggle. Reflected.

props.name: value
props.description: Form value submitted when the toggle is on.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name submitted with the form value.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text; falls back to slotted content when empty.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text (alternative to the label property).

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired (bubbles, composed) when the toggle state changes; read the new state from the element's checked property.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)

keyboard: Space toggles the switch
Enter toggles the switch
rules: A visually hidden native checkbox with role=switch provides focus, keyboard, and label-click semantics; aria-checked reflects the state.
Form-associated via ElementInternals (formAssociated = true); the value participates in native form submission when checked.

components.name: rr-textarea
components.summary: Form-associated multi-line text area with label, helper text, and error state.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name submitted with the form value.

props.name: value
props.description: Current text value; set as the form value via ElementInternals.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when empty.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text; renders a label element when non-empty.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text shown below the field (attribute: helper-text). Hidden when an error is present.

props.name: errorText
props.description: Error message (attribute: error-text); when set, marks the field invalid and replaces the helper text.

props.name: rows
props.description: Number of visible text rows on the inner textarea.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field required; shows a required indicator. Reflected.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the field. Reflected.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Optional override for the label text.

events.name: input
events.detail: Fired (bubbles, composed) as the value changes; mirrors the native input event.

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired (bubbles, composed) when the value is committed; mirrors the native change event.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Setting error-text marks the field invalid via ElementInternals.setValidity and replaces the helper text.

keyboard: Standard textarea editing keys apply to the inner native textarea
rules: Host uses delegatesFocus so focus forwards to the inner native textarea.
Error state sets aria-invalid and aria-errormessage; helper/error are wired via aria-describedby. The error container has role=alert.
Form-associated via ElementInternals (formAssociated = true); the value participates in native form submission.

components.name: rr-tab-list
components.summary: Accessible tab strip that wraps rr-tab elements, managing selection and arrow-key navigation.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the tablist (required); sets aria-label on the role=tablist element.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected tab value. Reflected; syncs the matching rr-tab child's selected state.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Place rr-tab elements here.

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired (bubbles, composed) when a tab is selected by click or keyboard; detail.value is the newly selected tab value.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Tab panels are managed by the consuming app — listen for the change event and show/hide content accordingly.

examples.title: Default
examples.html:
<rr-tab-list label="View options" value="overview">
  <rr-tab value="overview">Overview</rr-tab>
  <rr-tab value="details">Details</rr-tab>
  <rr-tab value="settings">Settings</rr-tab>
</rr-tab-list>

keyboard: ArrowRight moves selection to the next enabled tab (wraps)
ArrowLeft moves selection to the previous enabled tab (wraps)
Home selects the first enabled tab
End selects the last enabled tab
rules: Implements roving tabindex across child rr-tab elements; disabled tabs are skipped during arrow navigation.
label is required so the tablist has an accessible name via aria-label.

components.name: rr-tab
components.summary: A single tab button used inside rr-tab-list; its selection state is managed by the parent.

props.name: value
props.description: Unique identifier for this tab; must match the value rr-tab-list uses for selection. Reflected.

props.name: selected
props.description: Marks the active tab. Set by the parent rr-tab-list — do not set directly. Reflected.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevents selection. Reflected.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Tab label text (and optional icon).

events.name: rr-tab-select
events.detail: Bubbles (composed) to rr-tab-list when the tab is clicked; detail.value is this tab's value. Not fired when disabled or already selected.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Do not set selected directly — control the active tab via rr-tab-list[value].

keyboard: Enter or Space activates the focused tab via its native button
rules: Roving tabindex (selected tab is 0, others -1) and aria-selected are managed in concert with rr-tab-list.
Host uses delegatesFocus so focus forwards to the inner button.

components.name: rr-spinner
components.summary: Animated circular loading indicator that announces its status to screen readers.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual size of the spinner. Reflected to the size attribute.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label announced to screen readers via the status region.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
The decorative SVG is aria-hidden; the visible label lives in a visually hidden role=status region with aria-live=polite.

components.name: rr-skeleton
components.summary: Animated shimmer placeholder for loading states. Text, circular, and rectangular shape variants.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape of the skeleton.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS width value. Defaults to 40px for circular, otherwise 100%.

props.name: height
props.description: CSS height value. Defaults to 40px for circular, otherwise 1em.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Decorative placeholder only — the inner element is role=presentation and aria-hidden, so it is excluded from the accessibility tree
Decorative only: marked role=presentation and aria-hidden. Announce loading state with a separate live region if needed.

components.name: rr-select
components.summary: Form-associated select dropdown with label, helper text, and error state. Options supplied via the options property.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name submitted with the selected value.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected option value.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label rendered above the select.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text shown when there is no error. Maps to attribute helper-text.

props.name: errorText
props.description: Error message; sets data-invalid and a custom validity. Maps to attribute error-text.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required and shows an asterisk.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the select.

props.name: options
props.description: Options to render: array of { value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Reuses the shared --component-input-* token set (covers text input, textarea, and select)

examples.title: Required with error
examples.html: <rr-select label="Pick one" name="choice" required error-text="Please select an option"></rr-select>

keyboard: Space or Enter opens the native option list
Arrow keys move between options
Type-ahead jumps to a matching option
rules: Built on a native select element; label, error, and helper are wired via for/aria-describedby/aria-errormessage

components.name: rr-radio-group
components.summary: Form-associated group of radio buttons. Renders a fieldset/legend and manages selection and form value for its rr-radio children.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name submitted with the selected value.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected radio value. Syncs the checked state of child radios.

props.name: label
props.description: Group label rendered as the legend.

props.name: errorText
props.description: Error message; sets data-invalid and a custom validity. Maps to attribute error-text.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the group as required.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the group and all child radios.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction of the radio options.

slots.name: default
slots.description: rr-radio child elements.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Place rr-radio elements in the default slot; the group manages their checked state and form value

examples.title: Default vertical group
examples.html:
<rr-radio-group name="size" label="Size" value="md">
  <rr-radio value="sm">Small</rr-radio>
  <rr-radio value="md">Medium</rr-radio>
  <rr-radio value="lg">Large</rr-radio>
</rr-radio-group>

examples.title: Error state
examples.html:
<rr-radio-group name="size" label="Size" required error-text="Please select a size">
  <rr-radio value="sm">Small</rr-radio>
  <rr-radio value="md">Medium</rr-radio>
</rr-radio-group>

keyboard: Arrow keys move selection within the group
Tab moves focus into and out of the group

components.name: rr-radio
components.summary: Individual radio button. Must be used inside rr-radio-group, which manages name, value, and selection.

props.name: value
props.description: The value this radio contributes to the group when selected.

props.name: checked
props.description: Visual checked state. Managed by the parent rr-radio-group.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the radio.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always use rr-radio inside an rr-radio-group — selection, name, and form value are managed by the group

keyboard: Space selects the focused radio
Arrow-key navigation and roving focus are handled by the parent rr-radio-group

components.name: rr-progress
components.summary: Horizontal progress bar with determinate and indeterminate modes, using native role="progressbar".

props.name: value
props.description: Current value (0–max). Ignored when indeterminate.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Show an animated indeterminate state instead of a fixed value. Reflected to an attribute.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label, applied as aria-label. Required when no visible label is nearby.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always provide a label (or an external visible label) so the progressbar has an accessible name
aria-valuenow is omitted and aria-busy="true" is set in indeterminate mode
aria-valuemin is always 0 and aria-valuemax tracks the max prop

components.name: rr-link
components.summary: Anchor enforcing the design system link style — underlined by default, underline removed on hover.

props.name: href
props.description: Link destination.

props.name: target
props.description: Browsing context. Use "_blank" to open in a new tab.

props.name: rel
props.description: rel attribute. Defaults to "noopener noreferrer" when target="_blank" unless overridden.

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour variant. Reflected to an attribute.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label forwarded to the anchor when link text alone is insufficient.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Link label content.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Links are underlined by default and lose the underline on hover — do not override this inverted convention

keyboard: Enter activates the link
Tab moves focus to and from the link
rules: rel="noopener noreferrer" is applied automatically for target="_blank" to prevent reverse tabnabbing
Provide aria-label when the visible link text is not descriptive on its own

components.name: rr-input
components.summary: Form-associated text input with label, helper/error text, and ElementInternals for native form participation.

props.name: type
props.description: Input type attribute (text, email, password, etc.).

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name for submission.

props.name: value
props.description: Current input value.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when empty.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label text above the input.

props.name: helper-text
props.description: Helper text below the input. Hidden when error-text is set.

props.name: error-text
props.description: Error message below the input. Sets aria-invalid and replaces helper text.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required. Shows asterisk and sets aria-required.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input.

props.name: autocomplete
props.description: Autocomplete hint for browser autofill.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Optional override for the label content.

events.name: input
events.detail: Fired on each keystroke, mirrors native input event.

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired on value commit (blur), mirrors native change event.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: The label element above the input.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the input
Standard text editing keys work natively
rules: aria-errormessage points to error div; aria-describedby mirrors the link while invalid as AT fallback.
When valid, aria-describedby points to helper text. When invalid, it switches to error text.
delegatesFocus ensures host element forwards focus to inner <input>.
ElementInternals.setFormValue() keeps the form value in sync with the input.

components.name: rr-icon
components.summary: Sized, accessible wrapper for inline SVG icons. Decorative by default; labelled icons become role="img".

props.name: size
props.description: Icon size, mapped to the icon-size design tokens. Reflected to an attribute.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label. When set, the host gets role="img"; otherwise it is aria-hidden="true" (decorative).

slots.name: default
slots.description: The SVG icon element to render.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Icon color is inherited from the parent — set color on the surrounding element, not the icon
Omit aria-label for purely decorative icons — the component applies aria-hidden="true" automatically
Set aria-label only when the icon conveys meaning not present in adjacent text — it then gets role="img"

components.name: rr-dialog
components.summary: Modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element with focus trap and Escape-to-close.

props.name: heading
props.description: Dialog title text rendered in the header.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the dialog is open. Reflected to an attribute.

props.name: close-on-backdrop
props.description: Close the dialog when the backdrop is clicked.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Dialog body content.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Action buttons, displayed in a right-aligned footer row. Footer is hidden when empty.

events.name: rr-dialog-close
events.detail: Fired whenever the dialog closes — via Escape, the close button, backdrop click, or programmatic close(). Bubbles and is composed.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Open and close the dialog via the open property or the show()/close() methods — both keep state and the rr-dialog-close event in sync

examples.title: Confirmation dialog with footer actions
examples.html:
<rr-dialog heading="Confirm action" open>
  Are you sure you want to delete this item?
  <rr-button slot="footer" variant="danger">Delete</rr-button>
  <rr-button slot="footer" variant="secondary">Cancel</rr-button>
</rr-dialog>

examples.title: Non-dismissible backdrop
examples.html:
<rr-dialog heading="Processing" close-on-backdrop="false" open>
  Please wait while we finish.
</rr-dialog>

keyboard: Escape closes the dialog
Tab and Shift+Tab cycle focus within the dialog (native modal focus trap via showModal())
Enter or Space activates the close button when focused
rules: Provide a heading so the dialog has an accessible name
The close button always carries aria-label="Close dialog"

components.name: rr-checkbox
components.summary: Form-associated checkbox with checked, indeterminate, and disabled states. Backed by ElementInternals.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is checked.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Mixed state; cleared when the user toggles the checkbox.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and form participation.

props.name: value
props.description: Form value submitted when checked.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text; falls back to slotted content when empty.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text (alternative to the label property).

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired when the checked state changes.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always provide a label (via the label prop or slotted content) so the control is named

examples.title: Checked
examples.html: <rr-checkbox name="agree" label="I agree to the terms" checked></rr-checkbox>

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the checkbox
Space toggles the checked state
rules: A hidden native input provides focus, keyboard, and label-click semantics
aria-checked is set to "mixed" while indeterminate, otherwise "true"/"false"

components.name: rr-card
components.summary: Surface container on the elevated background tier with optional header, body, and footer slots.

props.name: padding
props.description: Internal padding around the body slot. Header and footer padding is fixed.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Card heading row (title, actions, avatar). Hidden when empty.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Card body content.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Card footer row (secondary actions, metadata). Hidden when empty.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Use background.alt for surface separation rather than a shadow token

examples.title: Header, body, footer
examples.html:
Card title

Card body text.

Last updated today

rules: Card is a presentational container with no implicit role; use a heading element in the header slot for document structure

components.name: rr-button
components.summary: Button with primary/secondary/danger variants, three sizes, loading spinner, and full keyboard/form semantics.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant: primary (filled CTA), secondary (outlined), danger (destructive).

props.name: size
props.description: Size: small, medium, large. Controls padding and font size.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button. Prevents click and removes from tab order.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner and sets aria-busy. Click suppressed while loading.

props.name: type
props.description: Button type attribute: button, submit, or reset.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label. Required for icon-only buttons.

slots.name: (default)
slots.description: Button label text.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Icon or element before the label.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Icon or element after the label.

events.name: click
events.detail: Native click event. Suppressed when disabled or loading.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Primary button: one per page maximum
Icon-only buttons must have aria-label

keyboard: Enter activates the button
Space activates the button
Tab moves focus to/from the button
rules: delegatesFocus ensures host element forwards focus to inner <button>.
aria-busy='true' set during loading state to communicate to AT.
Icon-only buttons require aria-label for accessible name.
disabled attribute removes from tab order and prevents activation.
Click events are suppressed when disabled or loading.

components.name: rr-badge
components.summary: Status badge and accent chip. 9 variants map to component tokens; brand theming cascades via CSS custom properties.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant. Status variants (success, warning, danger, info) convey semantic meaning. Accent variants are decorative emphasis tags.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Badge label text.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Add role="status" on the host element when badge content updates dynamically to create an ARIA live region.
Decorative badges (accent-*) do not need role="status" — they are static labels.
Badge text alone must convey meaning; do not rely solely on color to distinguish variants.

components.name: rr-avatar
components.summary: Circular identity surface showing initials or an image, with size and accent-color variants.

props.name: size
props.description: Circle diameter.

props.name: color
props.description: Accent-bold color variant for the initials surface.

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used to derive up to two initials and the accessible label.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. When set, an img fills the circle instead of initials.

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image; falls back to name when omitted.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Optional custom content to replace initials (e.g. an icon).

cssParts.name: img
cssParts.description: The img element (only when src is set).

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always provide name (or alt when using src) so the avatar has an accessible label
Initials avatars expose role=img with aria-label set to name; the initials text itself is aria-hidden
Image avatars derive alt from the alt prop, falling back to name

components.name: rr-alert
components.summary: Inline notification banner for success, warning, danger, and info messages. Optionally dismissible.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant and semantic role.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional bold title rendered above the body content.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: When true, renders a dismiss button that hides the alert and fires close.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Alert body content.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Optional icon in front of the title (use <rr-icon>).

events.name: close
events.detail: Fired when the dismiss button is clicked (only when dismissible).

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Use alert for form-level or system feedback; for field-level validation use rr-input error-text instead

examples.title: Danger, dismissible
examples.html: <rr-alert variant="danger" title="Upload failed" dismissible>The file could not be processed.</rr-alert>

examples.title: Info with icon
examples.html:
<rr-alert variant="info" title="Heads up">
  <rr-icon slot="icon" name="info"></rr-icon>
  Maintenance is scheduled for tonight.
</rr-alert>

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the dismiss button when dismissible
Enter or Space activates the dismiss button
rules: Do not rely on color alone to convey the alert variant — pair with a title or icon
The dismiss button carries an aria-label of "Dismiss"
